name: Chengdu Xuguang Electronics Co., Ltd.
summary: Chengdu Xuguang Electronics Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells ceramic-metal electro-vacuum devices in China. The company offers ceramic-metal transmitting tubes, such as high power broadcasting transmitting tubes, VHF/UHF TV transmitting tubes, microwave communication triodes and tetrodes, and transmitting tubes for lasers, as well as driving and vibration, and industry heating tubes. It also provides ceramic-metal vacuum interrupters for vacuum circuit-breakers, vacuum load-breaking switches, and vacuum contactors; and switchgears equipped with vacuum interrupters for use in the field of electric power distribution and transmission, metallurgy, and mining industries. In addition, the company offers high and low-voltage assemblies of distribution apparatus and electrical appliance elements. Further, it provides vacuum interrupters, electron tubes, and switchgears. The company also exports its products to Germany, the United States, Turkey, Taiwan, and internationally. Chengdu Xuguang Electronics Co., Ltd. was founded in 1965 and is based in Chengdu, China.
